implementation_blocked_reason: All review gates satisfied: T00 (rename) complete, T11 (Morpheus architecture review) ACCEPTED 2026-06-01, T12 (Trinity security review) ACCEPTED 2026-06-01. T01-T10 all unblocked.

ADR-M6-01.question: ACA as default deployment path vs AKS
ADR-M6-01.decision: Option A -- ACA as default deployment path. AKS optional track from M5 preserved unchanged.

ADR-M6-02.question: Azure Monitor OTLP endpoint vs Log Analytics direct ingestion
ADR-M6-02.decision: Option A -- OTLP endpoint env var swap. Zero code change from M5 instrumentation. APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING deferred to post-M6.

ADR-M6-03.question: Managed identity assignment strategy: user-assigned vs system-assigned per container app
ADR-M6-03.decision: Option A — user-assigned managed identity per service. Three separate azurerm_user_assigned_identity resources (managed_identity_bff, managed_identity_agent_execution, managed_identity_mcp_protected_api). OBO permissions granted only to agent_execution identity (post-M6). APIM system-assigned MI must not substitute delegated tokens. ADR-005 created.

dependencies.notes: M6 Task 0 (T00) depends on Ashley approval of Agent Execution Service naming. All implementation tasks depend on T00 completing (rename) and T11+T12 review sign-offs.

notes: Spec 006 created by Tank (Azure/Terraform/DevOps) as M6 spec-first gate artifact.
Approved component name: Agent Execution Service (slug: agent-execution). M6 Task 0 (T00) performs the filesystem and Compose rename.
ACA is the default deployment path per roadmap and Tank charter. AKS optional path from M5 remains available as an advanced track.
No terraform apply in any public CI workflow. CI validates only (fmt + validate).
All placeholder values must use {tenant-id}, {subscription-id}, {resource-group} brace tokens or all-zero GUIDs only.
Azure Monitor tracing is a config-only OTLP endpoint swap — no code change from M5 OTEL instrumentation.
AUTH_MODE=strict is the deployment gate: no fixture headers accepted, no mock tokens, real JWKS validation required.

T12 (Trinity security review) complete 2026-06-01. ADR-005 accepted (user-assigned MI per service). Binding conditions: C1 — add blueprint_audience strict-mode validation in T09; C2 — APIM must not substitute delegated token with MI token in T04. T06 and T09 are unblocked. T01-T08 await T11 (Morpheus).

morpheus.note: All 8 focus areas confirmed. No implementation changes required. M6 cleared for Trinity final closure review.

checks.C1_blueprint_audience_strict_mode: PASS — config.py guard raises ValueError on placeholder; 6 focused tests cover all cases; mock/disabled unaffected.
checks.C2_apim_no_mi_auth_substitution: PASS — binding comment in apim/main.tf, ingress-validate-user-token.xml, docker-compose.strict-aca.yml, and aca/README.md; token pass-through verified.
checks.no_secrets_in_terraform_env_docs: PASS — no real GUIDs in 18 M6 source files; brace-token and all-zero placeholders only; providers.tf reads IDs from variables.
checks.auth_mode_strict_hardcoded: PASS — container-app module hardcodes AUTH_MODE=strict; not a variable; mock path unreachable in ACA deployment.
checks.managed_identity_separation: PASS — three distinct user-assigned identities; OBO permissions bound exclusively to agent_execution; role assignments commented placeholders.
checks.otlp_no_secrets_no_pii: PASS — no secrets in OTLP config; PII/token span rules documented; OTEL_SDK_DISABLED=true in test environments.
checks.agent_execution_naming: PASS — consistent after two tiny doc corrections (see files_changed).

files_changed: config/env/agent-execution.env.example — OTLP URL aligned to otel.monitor.azure.com/v1/traces (FR-07)
config/env/bff.env.example — OTLP URL aligned to otel.monitor.azure.com/v1/traces (FR-07)
config/env/mcp-protected-api.env.example — OTLP URL aligned to otel.monitor.azure.com/v1/traces (FR-07)
docs/deployment/azure-container-apps.md — OTLP URL aligned to otel.monitor.azure.com/v1/traces (FR-07)
trinity.note: All seven security checks passed. Two tiny doc-only corrections applied (no implementation change). M6 READY FOR MORPHEUS FINAL CLOSURE.
